title: First Save
description: Complete your first case
condition: Complete 1 case

title: 10 Cases Cleared
description: Complete 10 cases
condition: Complete 10 cases

title: 50 Patients Saved
description: Pass 50 cases
condition: Pass 50 cases

title: Promoted to Intern
description: Reach level 2
condition: Reach level 2

title: Now a Resident
description: Reach level 3
condition: Reach level 3

title: Attending Physician
description: Reach level 6
condition: Reach level 6

title: Professor
description: Reach level 7
condition: Reach level 7

title: STEMI Slayer
description: Complete the ACS/STEMI case with grade A
condition: Complete the ACS/STEMI case with an A grade

title: Guideline Master
description: Score 90+ on Guideline in any case
condition: Achieve a Guideline score of 90 or higher in any single case

title: Clinical Detective
description: Score 90+ on Diagnostic in any case
condition: Achieve a Diagnostic score of 90 or higher in any single case

title: Budget Boss
description: Score 90+ on Cost in any case
condition: Achieve a Cost score of 90 or higher in any single case

title: Speed Demon
description: Score 90+ on Time in any case
condition: Achieve a Time score of 90 or higher in any single case

title: Perfect Run
description: Score A on all 5 score categories in one case
condition: Receive a grade of A across all five scoring categories in a single case

title: Saved Without ICU
description: Pass a critical case without triggering ICU transfer
condition: Complete a critical-severity case without triggering an ICU transfer event

title: No Harm Done
description: Complete a case with patient safety score 100
condition: Finish any case with a perfect patient safety score of 100

title: Patient Safety Hero
description: Keep safety score ≥80 in 5 consecutive cases
condition: Maintain a patient safety score of 80 or above across 5 consecutive cases

title: Primum Non Nocere
description: Complete any case without a single wrong answer
condition: Finish a case without selecting any incorrect answer choices

title: Bounced Back
description: Recover from a critical patient state to stable
condition: Turn a patient's status from critical back to stable within a single case

title: Aortic Ace
description: Complete Aortic Dissection without the thrombolysis trap
condition: Complete the Aortic Dissection case without incorrectly ordering thrombolytics

title: Rapid Responder
description: Complete any case in under 10 game-minutes
condition: Finish any case with fewer than 10 in-game minutes elapsed

title: First Night Shift
description: Complete your first Night Shift
condition: Finish a Night Shift scenario

title: Zero Death Shift
description: Complete a Night Shift with no patient deaths
condition: Finish a Night Shift with all patients alive (saved or harmed)

title: No Patient Left Behind
description: Save all 4 patients in a Night Shift
condition: Disposition all 4 patients with a saved outcome in a single Night Shift

title: Triage Master
description: Score 80+ on Triage in a Night Shift
condition: Achieve an average triage score of 80 or above across all patients in a Night Shift

title: Code Blue Survivor
description: Save a patient who had already deteriorated to critical
condition: Disposition a patient as saved even after they deteriorated during the shift

title: ICU First Save
description: Complete the ICU Cross-Cover scenario with at least one patient saved
condition: Save at least one patient in the ICU Cross-Cover scenario

title: Hyperkalaemia Hero
description: Save Margaret Liu by treating hyperkalaemia in the correct sequence
condition: Disposition the hyperkalaemia patient as saved in the ICU Cross-Cover scenario

title: Ward Call Warrior
description: Complete the Ward Calls — Intern Night scenario
condition: Disposition all patients in the Ward Calls scenario

title: Perfect Triage
description: Score 90+ on Triage Order in any Night Shift scenario
condition: Achieve a triage order score of 90 or above in any single Night Shift scenario

title: Tri-Shift Legend
description: Complete all 3 Night Shift scenarios at least once
condition: Complete all three Night Shift scenarios: ED, ICU, and Ward Calls

title: No Death Night
description: Complete any Night Shift scenario without a single patient death
condition: Disposition all patients in any scenario with no deaths (saved or harmed, not dead)
